LanguageData.VFEC_Javelin.tools.1.label: point
LanguageData.VFEC_Turret_Scorpion.description: A ballista-like turret capable of firing rapidly when set up and manned. Very effective against enemy infantry.
LanguageData.VFEC_TurretGun_Scorpion.description: A ballista-like turret capable of firing rapidly when set up and manned. Very effective against enemy infantry.
